name: 22kt Gold Lotus Ring
description: Handcrafted lotus ring in 22kt gold. Each petal is individually set for maximum light play, inspired by South Indian temple jewellery. Delivered in a signature gift box.
careInstructions: Avoid wearing while washing hands or swimming. Store separately to prevent scratching.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
